name: Saucepan Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine and chocolate in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Remove from heat; stir in 1 cup sugar. Blend in eggs, one at a time.
3. Add vanilla extract to the mixture.
4. Stir in flour and chopped nuts until well combined.
5. Spread batter evenly into a greased 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking pan.
6. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Remove from oven; allow to cool completely.
8. Cut into squares.
Makes 16 brownies.
